name: extensionless-file-language-guard
description: Prevents automatic language detection for saved files that have no filename extension, while leaving untitled/new unsaved editors alone so VS Code can still auto-detect their language from content.

extensionlessFileLanguageGuard.enabled.description: Enable guarding saved files that have no filename extension from VS Code's automatic language detection.

extensionlessFileLanguageGuard.schemes.description: URI schemes whose extensionless documents should be guarded.

extensionlessFileLanguageGuard.ignoredBa.description: Exact case-sensitive basenames that should keep VS Code's normal language behavior, such as Makefile or Dockerfile.

extensionlessFileLanguageGuard.showStatu.description: Show a short status bar message when a document is guarded or released.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
